job.title: Technical Manager – Full Stack, Cloud & AI Engineering - Data/SaaS @ FullStackTechies (Remote, IN)
job.description:
**Technical Manager – Full Stack, Cloud & AI Engineering - Data/SaaS**  
**Experience:** 9 – 12 Years  
**Location:** Remote  
**Mode of Engagement:** Full-time  
**No of Positions:** 1 – 3  
**Educational Qualification:** Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, or related field  
**Industry:** SaaS / AI Products / Software Products  
**Notice Period:** Immediate Joiners Preferred

**What We Are Looking For**

* Strong experience leading full-stack engineering teams building Data Intensive SaaS products, enterprise platforms, and AI-powered applications.
* **Proven hands-on expertise across frontend, backend, databases, cloud infrastructure, and modern software architectures.**
* **Strong knowledge of React.js, Next.js, JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, Express.js, and API-driven application development.**
* **Experience designing scalable cloud-native applications on AWS, Azure, or GCP.**
* **Strong understanding of database design, optimization, and performance tuning using MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Redis.**
* **Experience managing engineering teams consisting of Frontend Developers, Backend Developers, QA Engineers, DevOps Engineers, UI/UX Designers, and AI Engineers.**
* **Good understanding of Generative AI, LLM applications, AI Agents, RAG systems, prompt engineering, and AI product development.**
* **Strong experience with software architecture, code quality, engineering processes, sprint planning, and delivery management.**
* **Ability to balance hands-on technical leadership with people management responsibilities.**

**Responsibilities**

* Lead and manage end-to-end engineering delivery across frontend, backend, cloud, database, DevOps, and AI initiatives.
* **Define and review application architecture, technology stack decisions, scalability strategies, and engineering best practices.**
* **Drive development of SaaS platforms, customer-facing applications, internal systems, APIs, and AI-powered products.**
* **Collaborate with Product, Design, QA, DevOps, AI, and Business teams to ensure successful product delivery.**
* **Oversee development using React.js, Next.js, Node.js, cloud services, databases, and modern engineering frameworks.**
* **Mentor engineering teams through code reviews, technical guidance, performance management, and career development.**
* **Ensure application security, performance, scalability, reliability, and maintainability.**
* **Manage project planning, resource allocation, sprint execution, risk mitigation, and release management.**
* **Drive adoption of AI technologies, engineering automation, DevOps best practices, and development productivity improvements.**
* **Establish engineering KPIs, development standards, documentation practices, and delivery excellence.**

**Qualifications**

* 10–15 years of software engineering experience with at least 3–5 years in Technical Manager, Engineering Manager, Technical Lead, or Delivery Leadership roles.
* **Strong hands-on experience in JavaScript, TypeScript, React.js, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, and REST API development.**
* **Practical experience with MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, and database architecture.**
* **Experience with AWS, Azure, or GCP, including deployment, monitoring, scaling, and cloud infrastructure management.**
* **Strong understanding of Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, Git workflows, and DevOps practices.**
* **Experience building and deploying AI/LLM-based applications using OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, LangChain, LlamaIndex, or similar frameworks.**
* **Proven experience leading cross-functional engineering teams and delivering complex software products.**
* **Strong understanding of Agile methodologies, SDLC, engineering metrics, and project management.**
* **Excellent communication, stakeholder management, leadership, and decision-making skills.**

Pay: ₹1,000,272.98 - ₹1,630,269.67 per year

Benefits:

* Work from home

Application Question(s):

* How many years of experience do you have leading cross-functional engineering teams and delivering SaaS or software products?
* How many years of experience do you have in software engineering and full-stack application development?
* How many years have you worked in Technical Manager, Engineering Manager, Technical Lead, or Delivery Leadership roles?
* How many years of experience do you have building or deploying AI/LLM-based applications using OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, LangChain, LlamaIndex, or similar frameworks?
* How many years of hands-on experience do you have with Node.js, Express.js, and REST API development?
* How many years of hands-on experience do you have with React.js, Next.js, JavaScript, and TypeScript?
* Current CTC ( monthly )
* Notice Period (days)

Work Location: Remote

job.title: Full Stack Developer @ vyoman Infraprojects Pvt Ltd (MH, IN)
job.description:
Job Title: Full Stack Developer

**Location:** Mumbai (On-site/Hybrid)  
**Experience:** 3–7 Years  
**Employment Type:** Full-Time

About the Role

We are seeking a highly motivated and skilled **Full Stack Developer** to join our growing technology team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing, developing, testing, and maintaining scalable web applications while collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions.

Key Responsibilities

* Develop and maintain responsive web applications using modern front-end and back-end technologies.
* Design, build, and manage RESTful APIs and microservices.
* Collaborate with UI/UX designers to implement user-friendly interfaces.
* Write clean, scalable, and efficient code following best practices.
* Optimize applications for maximum speed, scalability, and security.
* Integrate third-party APIs, databases, and cloud services.
* Troubleshoot, debug, and upgrade existing applications.
* Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical documentation.
* Work closely with product managers and stakeholders to understand business requirements.

Required Skills & QualificationsFront-End

* Strong proficiency in **HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+)**
* Experience with **React.js, Angular, or Vue.js**
* Knowledge of responsive design and cross-browser compatibility

Back-End

* Experience with **Node.js, Python, Java, PHP, or .NET**
* Strong understanding of RESTful APIs and web services
* Experience with server-side architecture and application development

Database

* Proficiency in **MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, or SQL Server**
* Experience in database design, optimization, and management

Cloud & DevOps

* Knowledge of **AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform**
* Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines
* Experience with Git and version control systems

Preferred Qualifications

* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field
* Experience with Agile/Scrum methodologies
* Knowledge of cybersecurity best practices
* Experience working on enterprise-level applications
* Understanding of AI integrations and modern software architectur

Pay: ₹30,000.00 - ₹50,000.00 per month

Benefits:

* Flexible schedule

Work Location: In person

job.title: Software Developer @ Ginni Systems Limited (HR, IN)
job.description:
**About the Role**
------------------

We're looking for a hands-on Java Developer with 4–5 years of experience who combines solid engineering fundamentals with sharp problem-solving instincts. You'll design and build scalable backend systems, write clean and maintainable code, and work fluidly with modern AI-assisted development tools to ship quality software fast.

**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------

* Design, develop, and maintain robust, high-performance backend applications in Java.
* Contribute to architecture decisions — service design, data modeling, API contracts, and scalability trade-offs.
* Design, build, and operate microservices, including inter-service communication, resilience, and deployment.
* Instrument services for observability — logging, metrics, distributed tracing, and alerting — to ensure reliability in production.
* Write clean, well-tested, production-grade code and participate in code reviews.
* Leverage AI-assisted / "vibe coding" tools (e.g., Copilot, Claude, Cursor) to prototype and deliver features efficiently, while maintaining full ownership and understanding of the output.
* Debug complex issues across the stack and reason through ambiguous problems independently.
* Collaborate with product, QA, and DevOps to deliver end-to-end features.

**Required Skills & Qualifications**
------------------------------------

* 4–5 years of professional Java development experience.
* Strong grasp of core Java, OOP, collections, concurrency, and the JVM.
* Solid experience with Spring / Spring Boot and building RESTful APIs.
* **Architecture:** Proven ability to design scalable, maintainable systems; understanding of microservices, design patterns, and system design principles.
* **Microservices:** Hands-on experience building and running microservices — service decomposition, REST/gRPC communication, API gateways, and resilience patterns (circuit breakers, retries).
* **Observability:** Practical experience with logging, metrics, and distributed tracing using tools like Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, Jaeger, or similar.
* **Coding:** Clean-code discipline, strong testing habits (JUnit/Mockito), and Git-based workflows.
* **Vibe coding:** Comfortable and productive with AI-assisted coding tools; able to prompt, review, and refine AI-generated code rather than blindly accept it.
* **Analytical ability (high IQ):** Excellent logical reasoning and problem-solving skills; able to break down complex problems and learn new concepts quickly.
* Experience with SQL and at least one relational database.
* Familiarity with cloud platforms (Azure) and CI/CD pipelines.

**Nice to Have**
----------------

* Experience with message queues (Kafka, RabbitMQ) and caching (Redis).
* Containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes).
* Exposure to event-driven or distributed systems at scale.

**What We Offer**
-----------------

* Ownership of meaningful, high-impact work.
* A modern, AI-forward engineering culture.

job.title: Senior Technical Consultant @ Salesforce (KA, IN)
job.description:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*

Job Category

Customer Success

Job Details

**About Salesforce**

Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.

Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.

**Job Category:** Engineering

**About Salesforce:**
---------------------

**We’re Salesforce, the Customer Company, inspiring the future of business with AI+ Data +CRM. Leading with our core values, we help companies across every industry blaze new trails and connect with customers in a whole new way. And, we empower you to be a Trailblazer, too — driving your performance and career growth, charting new paths, and improving the state of the world. If you believe in business as the greatest platform for change and in companies doing well and doing good, you’ve come to the right place.**

  

**About the Role**
------------------

**We are seeking an agile, end-to-end Full-Stack Developer to own the technical execution, rapid prototyping, and release lifecycle of our next-generation pre-sales scoping and estimation tool. As a core member of a lean engineering team, you will act as a "Full Stack" specialist, carrying direct responsibility for the entire application development lifecycle—spanning frontend construction, backend service integration, database configuration, deployment, and comprehensive quality assurance testing. Working under the guidance of the Technical Architect, you will leverage cutting-edge AI-augmented developer workflows to translate low-level designs into responsive web interfaces featuring embedded Claude plugin agents that securely interact with distributed systems.**

**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------

* **Rapid POC Implementation:** Collaborate closely with the Technical Architect to quickly transform stakeholder requirements into functional, interactive Proof of Concepts (POCs) and operational prototypes.
* **Design Execution & Modular Coding:** Take ownership of Low-Level Designs (LLDs), converting software specifications into clean, maintainable, and highly modular code blocks utilizing modern JavaScript frameworks.
* **Agent Embedded Development:** Develop web-based application tiers featuring embedded Claude plugin agents. Implement unified cross-system data bridges using Model Context Protocol (MCP) to allow background reasoning loops to fetch context securely from external enterprise systems.
* **API Integration & Authentication:** Develop and consume robust RESTful services. Configure and execute precise authentication workflows supporting safe data transmission, strictly adhering to OAuth variants (including Username-Password flow, Web Server flow, and JWT flow).
* **Database Management & Persistence:** Design, optimize, and maintain relational or specialized database structures to provide optimal data persistence for scoping configurations and real-time computation states.
* **CI/CD Pipeline Maintenance:** Commit code, manage version control histories via Git, and interact with automated Jenkins build jobs to deploy software securely across SaaS platforms like Heroku.
* **Quality Assurance & E2E Testing:** Write and execute comprehensive unit, integration, and user-acceptance test profiles to maintain software stability within an accelerated, high-yield iteration cycle.

**Required Experience & Skills**
--------------------------------

* **Professional Experience:** Strong foundation in full-stack software development with explicit experience building and deploying multi-tier web applications from scratch.
* **Advanced Web Framework Proficiency:** Exceptional capability in Advanced JavaScript / TypeScript combined with operational mastery of web environments like Node.js, React, or AngularJS.
* **AI Integration & Tooling Command:** Practical experience consuming LLM APIs, prompt tracking, and integrating agentic plugins. Expert command of modern AI-augmented coding toolchains (such as Cursor or Claude Code) to accelerate feature shipping is highly valued.
* **API and Security Foundations:** Firm comprehension of REST architecture, relational database indexing, and common security authorization token exchanges (OAuth, JWT).
* **DevOps and Lifecycle Discipline:** Practical familiarity managing collaborative repositories using Git, navigating automated Jenkins pipelines, and hosting application artifacts on SaaS infrastructures like Heroku.

**Desired Experience & Certifications**
---------------------------------------

* **Background or technical familiarity with the Force.com infrastructure (Apex, Lightning Web Components, Data Cloud) is highly advantageous but not mandatory.**
* **Familiarity with Markdown documentation and grounding strategies for Large Language Models.**

Unleash Your Potential

When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and *be your best* , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can *do your best* . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.

Accommodations

If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form .

Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.

Posting Statement

Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

Unleash Your Potential

When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and *be your best* , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can *do your best* . job.title: BMC Firmware Developer @ Avantao Technologies pvt ltd (KA, IN)
job.description:
**Job Title: BMC Firmware Developer**

**Experience:** 4–10 Years  
**Location:** Bangalore  
**Notice Period:** Immediate to 30 Days

**Job Description**

We are looking for an experienced **BMC Firmware Developer** with expertise in **OpenBMC development** and server management firmware. The ideal candidate should have strong experience in developing BMC firmware for server platforms, working with industry-standard management protocols, and debugging embedded systems.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Develop and enhance **BMC firmware** for Sideband and Out-of-Band (OOB) server management.
* Design, develop, and maintain features on the **OpenBMC** software stack.
* Implement and support server management protocols such as **Redfish** and **PLDM**.
* Collaborate with hardware, firmware, and validation teams to deliver high-quality firmware solutions.
* Debug and troubleshoot firmware issues using hardware debugging tools.
* Participate in code reviews, firmware testing, and performance optimization.
* Maintain code repositories and follow version control best practices.
* Develop automation scripts to support firmware development and testing.

**Required Skills**

* 4–10 years of experience in embedded firmware development.
* Hands-on experience in **BMC firmware development** for **Sideband / Out-of-Band (OOB) server management**.
* **Mandatory:** Strong experience with the **OpenBMC** software stack.
* Experience working with **Redfish** and **PLDM** protocols.
* Strong programming skills in **C**.
* Good understanding of **computer architecture**.
* Experience with version control systems such as **Git** and **Perforce**.
* Proficiency in scripting using **Python** and **Bash**.
* Experience using hardware debug tools such as **Logic Analyzers, Oscilloscopes, and JTAG Debuggers**.
* Strong analytical, debugging, and problem-solving skills.
* Excellent verbal, written, and interpersonal communication skills.

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Embedded Systems, or a related field.
* Experience working on server management firmware or enterprise server platforms is an added advantage.

Benefits:

* Paid sick time
* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person

job.title: Full Stack Developer @ QSA INDUSTRIES PVT LTD (HR, IN)
job.description:
Job Title: Full Stack Developer (IT Department)

**Company:** QSA Industries Pvt. Ltd.  
**Location:** Karnal, Haryana  
**Working Hours:** 9:30 AM – 6:00 PM (Monday to Saturday)  
**Salary:** (Based on experience and skills)

Job Summary

QSA Industries Pvt. Ltd. is seeking a talented **Full Stack Developer** to join our IT Department. The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing, maintaining, and enhancing web and mobile applications, integrating databases, building APIs, and supporting internal business automation systems. The candidate should be passionate about technology, problem-solving, and delivering scalable software solutions.

Key Responsibilities

* Design, develop, test, and maintain web and mobile applications.
* Build responsive front-end interfaces using **React.js**.
* Develop cross-platform mobile applications using **Flutter**.
* Create and maintain RESTful APIs and backend services.
* Design, optimize, and manage SQL databases.
* Write efficient SQL queries, stored procedures, and database reports.
* Integrate third-party APIs and cloud services.
* Debug, troubleshoot, and optimize application performance.
* Collaborate with different departments to automate business processes.
* Maintain application security, backups, and documentation.
* Participate in code reviews and follow best development practices.
* Support deployment, updates, and production maintenance.

Required Qualifications

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, BCA, MCA, B.Tech, or a related field.
* **1–3 years** of experience in Full Stack Development.
* Freshers with strong projects and skills may also apply.

Technical SkillsFrontend

* HTML5
* CSS3
* JavaScript (ES6+)
* React.js
* Bootstrap / Tailwind CSS
* Responsive Web Design

Mobile Development

* Flutter
* Dart
* Android & iOS App Development

Backend

* Node.js
* Express.js
* REST API Development
* Authentication & Authorization (JWT)

Database

* MySQL
* PostgreSQL
* SQL Queries
* Database Design
* Joins, Views, Indexes, Stored Procedures
* Query Optimization

Additional Skills

* Git & GitHub
* Firebase
* Google Apps Script (Preferred)
* JSON & API Integration
* Cloud Deployment Basics
* Debugging & Performance Optimization

Preferred Skills

* Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
* Good understanding of software development lifecycle (SDLC).
* Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
* Excellent communication and documentation skills.
* Experience with ERP, CRM, or business automation projects is an advantage.

Salary  
**(** *based on skills and experience.)*

Job Location

**Karnal, Haryana**

Working Hours

**9:30 AM – 6:00 PM (Monday to Saturday).**

Pay: From ₹25,000.00 per month

Benefits:

* Cell phone reimbursement

Work Location: In person

job.title: Sr. Executive Software Developer @ BizNest (GA, IN)
job.description:
We are seeking a skilled React, Frontend & Backend Developer to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will possess a strong background in both front-end and back-end development, with expertise in JavaScript, Typescript, Redux Saga middleware, and server-side technologies. The successful candidate will be responsible for designing, developing, testing, and deploying scalable and maintainable web and mobile applications, ensuring high performance, security, and cross-platform optimization.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Design architecture, develop architecture, and maintain complex React applications using JavaScript and Typescript.
* Implement Redux Saga middleware to manage application state and side effects.
* Build reusable components and front-end libraries for future use.
* Translate designs and wireframes into high-quality, scalable code.
* Optimize components for maximum performance across a vast array of web-capable devices and browsers.
* Develop, maintain, and optimize back-end services and APIs using Node.js and Express.js.
* Design, develop, and integrate RESTful APIs and efficient server-side architecture.
* Implement and optimize APIs, ensuring efficient and secure data exchange between the client and server.
* Ensure cross-platform optimization and responsiveness of applications.
* Write unit tests using testing frameworks such as Jest or Mocha to ensure code quality and reliability.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify, design, and prioritize project requirements.
* Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve application issues, optimizing performance and efficiency.
* Maintain code quality, organization, and automation through code reviews and best practices.
* Create and maintain technical documentation, including architectural designs and API documentation.
* Mentor junior developers, providing technical direction, code reviews, and guidance.
* Stay up-to-date with the latest industry trends, technologies, and best practices.
* Communicate effectively with stakeholders to ensure project requirements are met.

**Requirements:**

* Minimum of 4+ years of experience in React development with a strong understanding of React fundamentals, components, and state management.
* Minimum of 4+ years in full-stack development, with a strong portfolio of web and mobile applications.
* Proficiency in JavaScript and Typescript, with experience in using TypeScript for robust and maintainable code.
* Experience with Redux Saga middleware, React Router, Redux, and other related technologies.
* Strong understanding of unit testing and testing frameworks, with experience writing unit tests using Jest or Mocha.
* Hands-on experience with databases such as MongoDB, SQL Server, Oracle, MySQL, and caching mechanisms.
* Knowledge of multiple back-end languages (e.g., Java, Python, Ruby, PHP) and JavaScript frameworks (e.g., React, Node.js).
* Experience with mobile frameworks like React Native, Flutter, or Swift/Objective-C for iOS and Kotlin/Java for Android.
* Proficiency in Git and version control systems.
* Strong problem-solving skills, with the ability to troubleshoot and debug complex issues.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills with the ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams.
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field (relevant experience may be considered in lieu of a degree).
* 3-4 Years Backend Developer with Database & Architecture Experience)

**Soft Skills:**

* Clear communicator with the ability to articulate complex information and actionable insights.
* Team player with the ability to work autonomously while keeping teams informed.
* Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines.
* Ability to adapt quickly to new technologies and environments.

Mindfulness and a commitment to maintaining practices that keep you grounded.

Preferred: Only Goan Candidates.

Job Type: Full-time

Benefits:

* Provident Fund
* Work from home

Application Question(s):

* How many years of experience do you have?
* Where do you stay?
* What is your current CTC?
* What is your expected CTC?
* What is your notice period
* Mention your Skills

Education:

* Bachelor's (Preferred)

Work Location: In person

job.title: Senior Software Developer @ IRECORD INFOTECH SOLUTIONS PVT LTD (MH, IN)
job.description:
About Company:

iRecord Software serves as a powerful tool empowering the Indian investing community to manage their investments effortlessly, practice personal Investment Accounting, and streamline portfolio management. We developed the software in response to the absence of a suitable solution for Indian investors and professionals, who often resorted to outdated tools and complex spreadsheets, iRecord software eliminates the complexities of manual data tracking and errors associated with spreadsheet usage.

**Job Overview - Senior Software Developer** As a senior software developer, you will play a crucial role in transforming ideas into tangible solutions that make a significant impact. Our software is continuously evolving, and the position requires a robust background in technology, deployment environment, business and project/product management, along with exceptional communication skills and a dedication to delivering outstanding customer experiences. We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced candidate with a passion for coding and a strong aptitude for bridging technical gaps in our **Desktop** **Based** **application**. A solid understanding of the finance sector is essential, as is the ability to demonstrate top-tier communication and negotiation skills.

**Key Responsibilities:**

**1.** SoftwareDevelopmentLifeCycleManagement: **Oversee the entire software development life cycle, from conceptual design through to implementation and maintenance.**

**2. Cross-Functional** **Collaboration:** Collaborate with diverse teams to gather requirements and design effective solutions, identifying and resolving bugs and issues collaboratively.

3. CodeDevelopment: **Write clean, scalable, and maintainable code using .NET programming languages, with proficiency in C#, C++, JavaScript, CSS, and HTML.**

**4. Testing** **and** **Deployment:** Identify bottlenecks and bugs, test applications, and deploy systems both locally and on cloud servers.

5. TechnicalSupport: **Provide comprehensive technical support and troubleshooting.**

**6. Documentation** **Management:** Develop and maintain documentation related to code development, version updates, and error testing throughout the process, ensuring organized file management.

7. DatabaseManagement: **Demonstrated experience with database storage and structures.**

**8. Project** **Management** **Software:** Familiarity with project management tools to ensure timely updates on tasks. **Proficiency in software testing, merging, and working with live code.**

**Qualifications:**

**1.A minimum of 3+ years of experience as a full stack developer. Experience in Windows forms is a must.**

**2.Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology or a related field (MSc in IT preferred).**

**3.**Techstackfamiliarity**: .NET, JavaScript, C#, C++, JSON, HTML, CSS, Github, Visual Studio.**

**4.Hands-on experience with SQL-driven databases such as MySQL, SQLite, or MongoDB.**

**5.Experience with cloud server deployments and architectures, specifically AWS or Azure.**

**6.Familiarity with API authentication (OAuth), rate limiting, documentation, and API fundamentals.**

**7.Experience in a SaaS or software company, with knowledge of project and product management.**

**8.Strong interpersonal and communication skills. 9.Self-motivated and results-driven, with the ability to work independently and as part of a team.**

Pay: ₹60,000.00 - ₹200,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person

job.title: SW Engineer III - .NET, Angular @ Candescent (Digital First Holdings LLC) (TS, IN)
job.description:
Candescent is a forward-thinking technology company transforming how financial institutions deliver Intelligent Banking experiences. We unite digital banking, account opening, and branch solutions that power and connect digital banking, account opening, and branch solutions—creating seamless engagement across digital, remote, and in-person channels.

Our Experience-Led, Intelligence-Driven approach combines human-centered design with data, automation, and cloud-based innovation. Built on an API-first architecture, our extensible ecosystem enables institutions to adapt quickly, integrate easily, and unlock new opportunities for growth—turning every customer interaction into a moment of clarity, confidence, and connection.

**About Candescent**

Candescent is a U.S.-based financial technology company that powers Intelligent Banking for banks and credit unions. The company helps financial institutions move beyond traditional digital banking by unifying data, channels, and real-time intelligence into a single, cohesive platform that delivers adaptive, human‑centered experiences across every interaction.

**Position Summary & Key Areas of Responsibility**

* Develop **high-quality, maintainable, and reusable software components** that meet functional and non-functional requirements.
* Leverage **AI-powered development tools** such as **Microsoft Copilot, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, or similar GenAI IDE assistants** to accelerate coding, refactoring, and test generation.
* Diagnose, isolate, and resolve system failures caused by defects in software design or implementation.
* Apply **AI-assisted code reviews**, static analysis, and automated quality checks to improve code reliability and performance.
* Identify and implement improvements in **engineering practices**, including the adoption of **AI‑driven developer workflows**.
* Utilize software‑based system maintenance, observability, and tracking tools.
* Contribute to technical documentation, developer guides, and customer-facing materials, including **AI‑generated or AI‑enhanced documentation** where applicable.
* Design, write, and execute **unit, integration, and automated tests**, including **AI-generated test scaffolding and coverage analysis**.
* Analyze, design, and implement software mechanisms to improve **code stability, performance, security, and reusability**.
* Participate in and lead **code reviews**, mentoring peers on **effective use of AI coding assistants** without compromising engineering standards.
* Create high‑fidelity estimates for work items, considering dependencies and risks.
* Assist with team commitments within Sprint planning, backlog grooming, and delivery.
* May lead, mentor, and advise other engineering resources as part of project activities.
* Act as a **subject matter expert** in Microsoft‑based systems and modern software engineering practices.
* Stay current with **AI, software engineering, and cloud-native trends**, disseminating knowledge and defining best practices.
* Collaborate with Solution Management, Product, Security, and Platform teams across the organization.

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS:**

* Bachelors Degree in Computer Science or related field
* A minimum of 6 to 9 years of experience in software design and development
* A minimum of 6 years of experience in preferred technology stack:
* Microsoft Full stack design & development
  + **Microsoft .NET 8.0 or above, C#, C++**
  + **WPF, WinForms, Javascript, HTML, CSS, NodeJS, Typescript, Angular 15** and above
  + Object Oriented programming
  + Windows programming
  + Experience developing Web based applications using HTML 5 & **OAuth2**
* API based design and development using **REST & SOAP** frameworks
* Experience in deployment and troubleshooting in **K8** environment
* Good hands-on database on relational database like - **SQL Server, Oracle**
* Expertise in design patterns like – MVC, Microservice architecture
* Deep understanding of Software Development and Quality Assurance best practices
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills
* Excellent teamwork and collaboration skills
* Experience operating in an Agile environment, with a deep understanding of agile development principles.
* Familiarity with Continuous Improvement and Six Sigma Lean principles.

**AI & Modern Engineering Skillsets**

* Hands‑on experience using **AI coding assistants** such as:
  + **Microsoft Copilot / GitHub Copilot**
  + **Cursor or equivalent AI‑first IDEs**
* Experience applying **Generative AI for**:
  + Code generation and refactoring
  + Test generation and coverage improvement
  + Documentation and API contract generation
* Strong understanding of **responsible AI usage**, including code correctness, security, data privacy, and licensing considerations.
* Ability to critically review and validate **AI‑generated code outputs**.

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS:**

* Worked in any Software Development Life Cycle model and desirable working in Agile environment
* Knowledge of software development standards and protocols.
* Experience with tools utilized in development environment:

* Ant, SVN, MAVEN, JIRA, Confluence,GitLab
* Software application in container – Docker, Kubernetes
* CI, TDD using Nunit for Unit tests
* Knowledge about ATMs will be an added advantage

**Statement to Third Party Agencies**  
To ALL recruitment agencies: Candescent only accepts resumes from agencies on the preferred supplier list. Please do not forward resumes to our applicant tracking system, Candescent employees, or any Candescent facility. Candescent is not responsible for any fees or charges associated with unsolicited resumes.

job.title: Product Manager @ Skysun (CH, IN)
job.description:
**Job Description – Product Manager**

**Experience:** 4–7 Years

**Employment Type:** Full-Time

**Mode**-On Site

**Location**-Mohali

Night Shift-8:30pm to 5:30am

**About the Role**

We are looking for a **Product Manager** who can bridge the gap between Business Analysts and the Engineering team. Your primary responsibility will be ensuring that business requirements are clearly understood, development work is properly planned, and projects are delivered on time with high quality.

This role is about ownership, communication, and execution. You will work with Business Analysts, Developers, QA, UI/UX, DevOps, and leadership to ensure every project moves smoothly from planning to delivery.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Take business requirement documents and workflow mappings from the Business Analyst.
* Convert requirements into clear development tasks and priorities.
* Work closely with Engineering Managers and developers to ensure work is delivered correctly and on schedule.
* Track project progress and proactively identify risks or delays.
* Coordinate between Product, Engineering, QA, DevOps, UI/UX, and other stakeholders.
* Lead sprint planning, backlog grooming, and daily progress tracking.
* Ensure developers have everything needed before work begins.
* Clarify requirements whenever there is ambiguity.
* Validate completed features before handing them over for testing.
* Keep leadership updated on project status, blockers, and timelines.
* Ensure projects meet business requirements before release.
* Drive accountability across cross-functional teams.

**Required Experience**

* 3–5 years of experience as a Product Manager, Technical Product Manager, or Project Manager in software development.
* Experience working directly with Business Analysts and Engineering teams.
* Strong understanding of Agile and Scrum methodologies.
* Experience managing software projects from planning through production.
* Ability to communicate with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
* Strong organizational and problem-solving skills.

**Nice to Have**

* Experience working with MERN Stack development teams.
* Jira, ClickUp, Azure DevOps, or similar project management tools.
* Experience working with UI/UX designers.
* Basic understanding of APIs and system integrations.
* Experience with CRM or SaaS platforms.
* Technical background or Computer Science education.

**What We’re Looking For**

We are looking for someone who:

* Takes ownership of projects from start to finish.
* Communicates clearly with every department.
* Can manage multiple priorities without losing attention to detail.
* Follows up relentlessly until work is completed.
* Identifies problems before they become blockers.
* Keeps engineering teams aligned with business goals.
* Makes decisions based on data and business impact.
* Thrives in a fast-paced environment.
* Holds teams accountable while maintaining strong working relationships.

**Success in This Role**

Within your first year, you will be expected to:

* Deliver projects on time and with minimal rework.
* Improve communication between Business, Product, and Engineering.
* Reduce project delays by identifying risks early.
* Ensure development teams clearly understand business requirements.
* Establish predictable delivery timelines and improve execution across multiple projects.

**Preferred Skills**

* Agile / Scrum
* Product Roadmapping
* Sprint Planning
* Backlog Management
* Jira / ClickUp / Azure DevOps
* Process Mapping
* Workflow Analysis
* Stakeholder Management
* Risk Management
* Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC)
* API Fundamentals
* Requirements Gathering

**Ideal Candidate**

You’re highly organized, proactive, and execution-focused. You know how to turn business requirements into actionable development plans, keep cross-functional teams aligned, and ensure projects are delivered on time without sacrificing quality. You take ownership, communicate effectively, and don’t let tasks fall through the cracks.

Pay: ₹1,000,000.00 - ₹1,900,000.00 per year

Benefits:

* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person

job.title: Sr. Technical Lead, Software Engineer (Java, React, Oracle, AI skills) @ Vertafore (TS, IN)
job.description:
Our fast-paced and collaborative environment inspires us to create, think, and challenge each other in ways that make our solutions and our teams better. Whether you’re interested in engineering or development, marketing or sales, or something else – if this sounds like you, then we’d love to hear from you!

We are headquartered in Denver, Colorado, with offices in the US, Canada, and India.

**The insurance industry runs on Vertafore.** We equip agencies, MGAs, and carriers with the core digital systems, specialized AI, and data-driven foundation to eliminate distribution drag across the insurance lifecycle, spanning sales, servicing, and back-office operations.

Underpinned by unmatched speed and performance power, we are the trusted backbone that’s taking the insurance industry from friction to flow with **Distribution Velocity** –speed, performance, and trust - to drive growth at scale.

With over 95% of the top agencies and insurers and 50% of industry compliance transactions running through Vertafore, **we lead at the intersection of innovation and trust**, giving insurance professionals the confidence to transform and win in the AI era.

Our reach is global, with headquarters in Denver, Colorado, and offices across the U.S., Canada, and India.

**JOB DESCRIPTION**

We seek a highly skilled Sr. Tech Lead – Software Engineering to join our product development project team. As a Sr. Tech Lead, you will lead the design, development, and deployment of complex web applications using React, focusing on front-end architecture and strong collaboration with cross-functional teams. You will also guide the team on best practices, scalability, and performance optimization to deliver high-quality solutions.

**Key Responsibilities:**

Essential job functions included but are not limited to the following:

* **Technical Leadership**: Lead end-to-end full stack development efforts using latest React version, JAVA, Oracle and related tools, focusing on building scalable and efficient web applications.

* **Project Ownership**: Take ownership of the full development lifecycle, from design and development to deployment, ensuring adherence to timelines and quality standards.

* **Collaboration**: Work with cross-functional teams, including UX/UI designers, QA engineers, and product owners, to ensure seamless integration of front-end and back-end services.

* **Requirement Gathering:** Engage with product team to understand business requirements, processes, and pain points.

* **Translation to Technical Solutions:** Convert business requirements into technical implementation.

* **AI-Augmented Engineering:** Drives team governance and AI-native standards, designs high-context specifications, evaluates new AI capabilities, and mentors the team on advanced engineering workflows.

* **Code Reviews**: Conduct code reviews to ensure adherence to best practices and optimize performance, scalability, and security.

* **Mentorship**: Guide junior developers on best practices and technologies.

* **Performance Optimization**: Ensure applications' performance, scalability, and security by implementing industry-leading practices and tools.

* **Documentation**: Maintain clear technical documentation for the solutions built to ensure ease of knowledge transfer and maintenance.

**Required Technical Skills:**

**Must Have Skills:**

**Front-End Development:**

**React:**

* Strong knowledge of React (version 18), including new features like Concurrent Rendering and Automatic Batching.
* Expertise in building and optimizing applications with React functional components and leveraging React Hooks for state and side effects management (e.g., useState, useEffect, useCallback, useMemo).
* Experience designing responsive, cross-browser compatible UIs using Flexbox, media queries etc
* Ability to abstract logic using reusable custom hooks for cleaner and maintainable components.

**Provider in React & Context API:**

* Experience with setting up Context Providers and effectively using React Context API for managing and passing data across component trees without prop drilling.
* Experience using Redux Toolkit for global state management in complex applications.

**Form Management:**

* Strong experience in building and managing forms in React using Formik, including handling complex form states and validations.
* Expertise in using Yup library for schema-based validation of forms, ensuring comprehensive client-side form validation.

**TypeScript:**

Strong hands-on experience with TypeScript for building type-safe React applications.

Deep understanding of TypeScript features like interfaces, generics, type inference, and modules for ensuring code reliability and scalability.

**Build Tools & Bundling Strategies**

* Proficient with modern JavaScript build tools such as Webpack, Vite, and Parcel for efficient module bundling, asset optimization, and development workflows.
* Experience configuring custom build pipelines, including setting up loaders, plugins, environment variables, and code splitting strategies to optimize performance and build size.

**HTML/CSS & UI Frameworks:**

**HTML/CSS:**

* Strong understanding of semantic HTML and modern CSS for responsive web design.

**API & Backend Integration:**

**REST API Knowledge:**

* Experience consuming and integrating RESTful APIs into React applications, including error handling, request optimization, and managing API responses using tools like Axios or Fetch API.

**AI Augmentation:**

* Drive the end-to-end software development by actively utilizing modern AI-assisted development toolkits (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Claude Code etc.) to optimize daily coding velocity and documentation.
* Utilize AI diagnostics to accelerate root-cause analysis and triage bugs across the entire application stack.
* Demonstrate strong prompt-engineering habits.
* Demonstrate curiosity and willingness to learn modern AI-native engineering practices and emerging AI development tools.
* Critically review, audit, and benchmark AI-assisted code contributions against rigorous enterprise performance, data privacy, and security standards before production rollout.
* Champion the adoption of modern, AI-native engineering practices across the team, elevating overall engineering velocity while maintaining flawless software quality.

  

**Testing and Quality Assurance:**

* Experience in writing and executing Playwright/Jest/RTL test cases to ensure the quality and performance of end-to-end user flows.

**Performance Optimization**

* Proven ability to optimize React applications using lazy loading, code splitting, and efficient state management techniques to improve application performance.

**Build Tools:**

* Hands-on experience with build tools like Webpack, Vite, or Parcel to optimize development workflows and manage modern JavaScript applications efficiently.

**Backend Development**

* Design, develop, and maintain enterprise applications using Java, Struts, Spring Boot, Hibernate, JSP, and Servlets.
* Implement business logic and database interactions with Oracle 19c.
* Develop RESTful APIs and microservices for distributed systems.

**Database Management**

* Write efficient SQL queries, stored procedures, and triggers in Oracle 19c.
* Perform database tuning, performance optimization.

**Messaging & Integration**

* Implement asynchronous communication and message-driven architectures using RabbitMQ.
* Integrate distributed systems and ensure reliable message delivery.

**System Architecture & Design**

* Architect and design scalable, secure, and maintainable solutions.
* Apply design patterns and best practices in enterprise application development.

**Nice to have skills:**

**Version Control & CI/CD:**

* Proficiency with Git and experience in managing feature branches and release cycles using GitLab.
* Experience setting up CI/CD pipelines for automated testing, building, and deploying React applications using tools like GitLab.

**Collaboration:**

**Collaboration Tools:**

* Proficiency in using tools like Rally and Teams to manage Agile workflows and communicate effectively across global teams.

* **Agile Methodologies:**
* Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments, actively participating in sprint planning, retrospectives, and iterative development cycles.

**Platform/Tools:**

* Experience with AWS cloud platforms (EC2, S3 etc), Terraform.

* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Engineering, or a related field.

* Are interested and capable of learning other programming languages as needed.

job.title: Laravel Developer @ Param Software (GJ, IN)
job.description:
* Rajkot
* Full Time

**Job Details**
---------------

**Job Overview**

We are looking for an experienced **Full Stack Laravel Developer** who is proficient in developing and maintaining robust ERP solutions. The ideal candidate should have hands-on experience in full-stack development using Laravel and a good understanding of business logic in ERP systems.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Design, develop, and maintain high-quality web applications using Laravel.

* Work on customized ERP solutions tailored to client requirements.

* Collaborate with front-end developers, UI/UX designers, and other backend developers.

* Integrate third-party APIs and tools as needed.

* Ensure code quality through unit testing and peer code reviews.

* Participate in the full software development lifecycle: requirement gathering, architecture design, development, testing, deployment, and maintenance.

* Troubleshoot, test, and maintain the core product software and databases to ensure strong optimization and functionality.

* Document the development process, architecture, and standard components.

**Required Skills & Qualifications**

* Minimum **3 years of hands-on experience** with the Laravel framework.

* Solid understanding of **PHP**, **MySQL**, and **OOP concepts**.

* Experience in **ERP development** will be a strong advantage.

* Proficient in front-end technologies like **HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Vue.js or React**.

* Familiarity with **version control tools** like Git.

* Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently.

* Good communication and collaboration skills.

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Prior experience with **RESTful APIs** and **Microservices Architecture**.

* Knowledge of **Laravel Framework.**

* Understanding of **Agile/Scrum methodologies**.

* Exposure to **cloud platforms** like AWS or Azure is a plus.

**Location Preference**

* Candidates **residing in Rajkot** will be given **first preference**.

* Applicants from other locations must be **willing to relocate** to Rajkot.

**Why Join Us?**

* Be part of a growing and innovative team.

* Work on impactful projects with real-world applications.

* Friendly and collaborative work environment.

* Opportunities for continuous learning and career growth.

**To Apply:**

Send your updated resume to hr@paramsoftware.com with the subject line “Application for Laravel Developer – Rajkot”.

  Rajkot

job.title: Lead Full Stack Developer @ Eastencher Software pvt lmt, Bengaluru (KA, IN)
job.description:
Job Description: Lead Full stack Developer (.NET & Angular)

* **Location:** Bangalore
* **Experience:** 9-15Years
* **Open Positions:** 2
* **Company:** Eastencher Software Pvt. Ltd.

**Why Join Us?**

At Eastencher, you won’t just code—you’ll architect, design, and lead the delivery of impactful, AI-driven products across healthcare, fintech, and enterprise automation. If you love working on modern tech stacks, designing highly scalable systems, and mentoring engineering talent, this leadership role is built for you.

**What You’ll Do:**

* **Architecture & Design:** Own the end-to-end technical architecture, software design patterns, and scalability of robust backend microservices (.NET Core) and dynamic frontends (Angular).
* **Team Leadership:** Direct, mentor, and manage a high-performing engineering team of 8–9 developers, driving engineering excellence and agile delivery practices.
* **Cloud Strategy:** Architect and manage secure, scalable cloud infrastructure on Azure, implementing robust CI/CD automation pipelines for continuous delivery.
* **Hands-on Delivery:** Lead by example by writing clean, modular code for core components, conducting rigorous code reviews, and establishing engineering best practices across the team.
* **Cross-Functional Collaboration:** Partner closely with UI/UX, Product Management, DevOps, and leadership to transform complex business requirements into high-performing technical solutions.

What We’re Looking For

* **Experience:** 9–15 years of hands-on experience in Full Stack development, with a proven track record in a Tech Lead or Technical Architect capacity.
* **Leadership Skills:** Strong experience leading, mentoring, and managing a team of 8+ developers (including task allocation and technical governance).
* **Technical Architecture:** Deep understanding of software architecture, OOP concepts, Microservices patterns, and designing highly distributed enterprise systems.
* **Backend Mastery:** Advanced skills in C#, ASP.NET Core, Web API, EF Core, and database management (SQL Server/PostgreSQL).
* **Frontend Expertise:** Proficient in Angular (latest versions), TypeScript, and State Management (NgRx) to build responsive, dynamic UIs.
* **Cloud & DevOps (Mandatory):** Hands-on experience with Azure cloud services, cloud deployments, performance optimization, and CI/CD pipelines.
* **Tools:** Deep familiarity with Git workflow strategies.

Bonus Skills (Good to Have)

* Containerization using Docker and Kubernetes.
* Domain experience in Healthcare or Fintech sectors.

Interview Process

* **Technical Round:** Virtual
* **Technical Scenario Round:** Face To Face in Office (Offline)
* **Managerial & Leadership Round:** Virtual
* **HR Discussion:** Virtual

Pay: ₹2,000,000.00 - ₹3,000,000.00 per year

Benefits:

* Paid sick time
* Paid time off
* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person
